cycle_sensitivity: 稼动率、capex节奏、客户库存和地缘政策共同驱动。
cycle_position: Bifurcated: leading-edge AI/HPC capacity is tight, while mature-node utilization is still recovering and policy-led additions create overcapacity risk.

valuation_anchor: Utilization, node mix, capex ROI, depreciation, geopolitical risk premium

key_debates: 18A execution, foundry customer wins, balance sheet, x86 share
why_analysts_should_care: Combines product turnaround and foundry strategic debate.

business_description: High-speed interface IC supplier for displays, USB, PCIe and connectivity.
cycle_sensitivity: 跟随AI集群建设、以太网/InfiniBand升级、800G/1.6T端口迁移。
cycle_position: Mid structural upcycle: AI cluster scale-out and port-speed migration are still pulling content, while expectations are already elevated.
competition_context: Broadcom/Marvell/NVIDIA/Cisco占据核心；Credo/Astera/MACOM等抓高速连接增量。
key_kpis: switch radix, port speed mix, retimer attach, optical DSP ASP, cloud capex, rack architecture.
model_drivers: Port-speed transition, switch radix, retimer attach rate, optical DSP ASP, custom silicon wins, cloud capex and AI cluster topology.
leading_indicators: 800G/1.6T awards, Ethernet vs InfiniBand adoption, hyperscaler network architecture, Arista/Cisco order commentary, optical-module lead times.
valuation_anchor: Port-speed migration, attach rates, hyperscaler awards, custom silicon backlog
margin_profile: High when IP and product differentiation are strong; module-adjacent silicon faces ASP pressure
capital_intensity: Low internal capex; high dependence on advanced foundry and package allocation
ai_leverage: Very high
key_debates: PC/display cycle, high-speed interface upgrades
segment_consensus: Consensus believes AI scale-out increases the value of switch ASIC, retimer, SerDes, DPU/NIC and optical DSP content.
segment_recent_performance: Performance has been strong where investors see confirmed hyperscaler awards and port-speed migration; volatility comes from customer concentration and architecture shifts.
segment_trade_logic: The trade is data-movement bottleneck migration: if accelerator supply improves, networking silicon and interconnect become the next constraint; falsify with weak port-speed adoption or self-designed silicon displacement.

business_description: Display driver IC and timing controller supplier.
cycle_sensitivity: 手机换机、渠道库存和季节性强；RF受iPhone/Android旗舰周期影响明显。
cycle_position: Early recovery / restock watch: Android and consumer electronics are improving from inventory lows, but sell-through proof is still needed.
competition_context: Qualcomm/MediaTek/Apple internal modem、Skyworks/Qorvo/Maxscend/卓胜微等分层竞争。
key_kpis: handset units, content per device, premium mix, design wins, channel inventory, China Android sell-through.
model_drivers: Handset units, premium mix, content per device, Android channel inventory, Apple content share, auto/IoT diversification, RF module integration.
leading_indicators: Smartphone sell-through, Taiwan fabless monthly revenue, China Android launch calendar, Apple build plans, distributor inventory, panel shipments.
valuation_anchor: Unit cycle, content per device, customer concentration and inventory normalization
margin_profile: Medium to high; premium RF/CIS/SoC can be attractive, DDI and low-end connectivity more commoditized
capital_intensity: Low to medium; mostly fabless but inventory and module content matter
ai_leverage: Medium through edge AI and premium device content
key_debates: OLED/LCD panel cycle, customer concentration
segment_consensus: Consensus expects a gradual handset/consumer recovery, but does not yet underwrite a strong new supercycle outside selected AI edge or premium-content pockets.
segment_recent_performance: Stocks have been more mixed than AI infrastructure names; drivers are Android sell-through, Apple build plans, RF/CIS content and inventory normalization.
segment_trade_logic: The trade is selective restock-to-recovery: focus on share gain and content winners, avoid confusing channel replenishment with sustainable end-demand acceleration.
market_attention_logic: Korea display IC proxy. Current debate: OLED/LCD panel cycle, customer concentration. Segment trade: The trade is selective restock-to-recovery: focus on share gain and content winners, avoid confusing channel replenishment with sustainable end-demand acceleration.

coverage_depth: Comparable and segment context: refresh basic market data and use for peer-group checks.
coverage_priority_rationale: Important because Korea display IC proxy. Main live debate: OLED/LCD panel cycle, customer concentration
next_research_step: Split companies into handset-beta, connectivity-beta, display-beta and image-sensor-beta; do not compare RF, CIS and DDI on one multiple without cycle adjustment.

business_description: Power and display semiconductor supplier.
cycle_sensitivity: 工业和汽车库存周期显著；AI服务器电源链条提供结构性增量。
cycle_position: Bottoming / early recovery: distributor inventory and industrial weakness are still a drag, with the trade waiting for order inflection and utilization recovery.
competition_context: TI/ADI/Infineon/ST/NXP/ON/MPS等；中国模拟公司在中低端和国产替代中扩张。
key_kpis: book-to-bill, distributor inventory, auto backlog, industrial PMI, SiC utilization, power attach.
model_drivers: Industrial/auto inventory, channel sell-through, book-to-bill, utilization, pricing, SiC capacity, AI server power content.
leading_indicators: Distributor inventory days, auto production schedules, industrial PMI, EV inverter demand, data-center power density, lead times.
valuation_anchor: Through-cycle FCF, inventory inflection, design-in quality and utilization recovery
margin_profile: Medium to high; strongest in proprietary analog, auto/industrial and high-performance power
capital_intensity: Medium to high for IDMs and SiC; low to medium for fabless analog
ai_leverage: Medium, rising through AI server power and power density
key_debates: Power cycle, strategic alternatives
segment_consensus: Consensus expects analog/power to bottom as industrial and auto inventories normalize, but the timing is still debated.
segment_recent_performance: The group has lagged AI semis; stock moves are driven by order cancellations, distributor inventory, SiC pricing and evidence of utilization stabilization.
segment_trade_logic: The trade is early-cycle recovery with quality dispersion: buy when book-to-bill and lead times stabilize, but avoid low-end China price competition and overcapitalized SiC exposure.
market_attention_logic: Korea-listed/US-listed power/display watch. Current debate: Power cycle, strategic alternatives. Segment trade: The trade is early-cycle recovery with quality dispersion: buy when book-to-bill and lead times stabilize, but avoid low-end China price competition and overcapitalized SiC exposure.
upstream_stack_summary: Specialty wafers: SiC/GaN substrates, epitaxy, 8-inch analog wafers (Wolfspeed, Coherent, TankeBlue, Shin-Etsu, SUMCO) | Packages and passives: Power modules, ceramic substrates, leadframes, MLCC (ROHM, StarPower, Murata, Yageo, Shinko Electric)
coverage_depth: Watchlist: keep in universe for chain completeness, but verify listing/status before deeper work.
coverage_priority_rationale: Watchlist because Korea-listed/US-listed power/display watch. Main live debate: Power cycle, strategic alternatives
next_research_step: Separate long-cycle auto/industrial quality names from consumer analog and China localization names; normalize margins for utilization.

business_description: Packaging equipment supplier with HBM bonder exposure.
key_products: TC bonders, packaging equipment, vision placement
cycle_sensitivity: 跟终端出货、AI accelerator ramp和封装产能扩张相关。
cycle_position: Tight advanced-packaging upcycle, traditional OSAT recovery: CoWoS/HBM/2.5D is scarce, while legacy consumer packaging remains more cyclical.
competition_context: ASE/Amkor/JCET/Powertech/TFME/Huatian等；foundry captive packaging抬高门槛。
key_kpis: advanced packaging capacity, utilization, capex, AI customer mix, test hours, substrate availability.
model_drivers: Advanced packaging capacity, utilization, capex, AI customer mix, substrate availability, test hours, package ASP.
leading_indicators: CoWoS/HBM capacity expansions, OSAT monthly revenue, substrate lead times, AI accelerator ramps, packaging equipment orders.
valuation_anchor: Advanced packaging mix, utilization, capex ROI, customer pre-commitments
margin_profile: Low to medium in traditional OSAT; higher in scarce advanced packaging equipment/capacity
ai_leverage: Very high through CoWoS, HBM and 2.5D/3D packaging
key_debates: HBM bonder demand, competition, capacity
segment_consensus: Consensus is very positive on advanced packaging scarcity, while traditional OSAT remains more cyclical and margin-sensitive.
segment_recent_performance: Advanced packaging beneficiaries have traded on CoWoS/HBM capacity, customer reservations and capex plans; legacy OSAT still needs utilization recovery.
segment_trade_logic: The trade is packaging bottleneck migration: own scarce advanced packaging/test exposure, but track whether foundry captive packaging captures the economics.
market_attention_logic: Core HBM packaging equipment proxy. Current debate: HBM bonder demand, competition, capacity. Segment trade: The trade is packaging bottleneck migration: own scarce advanced packaging/test exposure, but track whether foundry captive packaging captures the economics.

coverage_depth: Deep-dive first wave: build source pack, CIQ market data refresh, segment model and thesis/falsifier.
coverage_priority_rationale: Core because Core HBM packaging equipment proxy. Main live debate: HBM bonder demand, competition, capacity
next_research_step: Separate traditional OSAT from advanced-packaging equipment and AI packaging capacity; watch capital intensity and customer concentration.

business_description: Bluetooth audio and low-power SoC supplier.
key_products: Bluetooth audio SoC, portable audio chips
cycle_sensitivity: 手机换机、渠道库存和季节性强；RF受iPhone/Android旗舰周期影响明显。
cycle_position: Early recovery / restock watch: Android and consumer electronics are improving from inventory lows, but sell-through proof is still needed.
competition_context: Qualcomm/MediaTek/Apple internal modem、Skyworks/Qorvo/Maxscend/卓胜微等分层竞争。
key_kpis: handset units, content per device, premium mix, design wins, channel inventory, China Android sell-through.
model_drivers: Handset units, premium mix, content per device, Android channel inventory, Apple content share, auto/IoT diversification, RF module integration.
leading_indicators: Smartphone sell-through, Taiwan fabless monthly revenue, China Android launch calendar, Apple build plans, distributor inventory, panel shipments.
valuation_anchor: Unit cycle, content per device, customer concentration and inventory normalization
margin_profile: Medium to high; premium RF/CIS/SoC can be attractive, DDI and low-end connectivity more commoditized
capital_intensity: Low to medium; mostly fabless but inventory and module content matter
ai_leverage: Medium through edge AI and premium device content
key_debates: TWS/audio cycle and competition
segment_consensus: Consensus expects a gradual handset/consumer recovery, but does not yet underwrite a strong new supercycle outside selected AI edge or premium-content pockets.
segment_recent_performance: Stocks have been more mixed than AI infrastructure names; drivers are Android sell-through, Apple build plans, RF/CIS content and inventory normalization.
segment_trade_logic: The trade is selective restock-to-recovery: focus on share gain and content winners, avoid confusing channel replenishment with sustainable end-demand acceleration.

business_description: Power management and power device supplier.
cycle_sensitivity: 工业和汽车库存周期显著；AI服务器电源链条提供结构性增量。
cycle_position: Bottoming / early recovery: distributor inventory and industrial weakness are still a drag, with the trade waiting for order inflection and utilization recovery.
competition_context: TI/ADI/Infineon/ST/NXP/ON/MPS等；中国模拟公司在中低端和国产替代中扩张。
key_kpis: book-to-bill, distributor inventory, auto backlog, industrial PMI, SiC utilization, power attach.
model_drivers: Industrial/auto inventory, channel sell-through, book-to-bill, utilization, pricing, SiC capacity, AI server power content.
leading_indicators: Distributor inventory days, auto production schedules, industrial PMI, EV inverter demand, data-center power density, lead times.
valuation_anchor: Through-cycle FCF, inventory inflection, design-in quality and utilization recovery
margin_profile: Medium to high; strongest in proprietary analog, auto/industrial and high-performance power
capital_intensity: Medium to high for IDMs and SiC; low to medium for fabless analog
ai_leverage: Medium, rising through AI server power and power density
key_debates: Consumer/industrial power cycle, margin
segment_consensus: Consensus expects analog/power to bottom as industrial and auto inventories normalize, but the timing is still debated.
segment_recent_performance: The group has lagged AI semis; stock moves are driven by order cancellations, distributor inventory, SiC pricing and evidence of utilization stabilization.
segment_trade_logic: The trade is early-cycle recovery with quality dispersion: buy when book-to-bill and lead times stabilize, but avoid low-end China price competition and overcapitalized SiC exposure.
